---
title: "yjh_IPF-human_dataprocessing"
author: "tang"
date: "2025-09-18"
output: html_document
---
**此脚本为确认图版的绘图脚本，只保留IPF这个data的样本进行绘图。只绘制ANTXR1这一个gene的表达值分布**

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

1 加载R包，读取IPF这个data的全部25个Samples，设置
```{r}
library(Seurat)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
output <- 'IPF_human'
dir.create(output)

st_25 <- qs::qread('/home/data/tmh_project/ST_COPD_IPF/1_IPF_output/2_SCT_IPF_list_S-BSST1410.qs')
st <-merge(st_25[[1]],st_25[-1])
qs::qsave(st,'IPF_human/IPF_25samples_S-BSST1410.qs')

```

2 绘制ANTXR1这个基因在25个samples中的空间表达值
```{r}
# 创建输出目录
output_1 <- 'IPF_human/25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v1'
dir.create(output_1, recursive = TRUE)

output_2 <- 'IPF_human/25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v2'
dir.create(output_2, recursive = TRUE)

output_3 <- 'IPF_human/25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v3'
dir.create(output_3, recursive = TRUE)

output_4 <- 'IPF_human/25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v4'
dir.create(output_4, recursive = TRUE)

# === 新增：创建V5版本输出目录 ===
output_5 <- 'IPF_human/25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v5'
dir.create(output_5, recursive = TRUE)

# 定义目标基因
genes <- c("ANTXR1", "FN1", "COL1A1", "ACTA2")

# 循环处理每个基因
for (gene in genes) {
  message("Processing gene: ", gene)
  
  # 1) 从st_25这个list中分别提取每个样本的基因最大表达值
  sample_names <- names(st_25)
  sample_max_values <- sapply(sample_names, function(sample_name) {
    sample_obj <- st_25[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      warning(sprintf("Gene %s not found in sample %s", gene, sample_name))
      return(NA_real_)
    }
    
    # 提取该样本中该基因的表达量并计算最大值
    gene_expr <- as.numeric(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data[gene, ])
    max_expr <- max(gene_expr, na.rm = TRUE)
    return(max_expr)
  }, USE.NAMES = TRUE)
  
  # 转换为数据框并保存
  sample_max_values_df <- data.frame(sample = names(sample_max_values), 
                                     max_value = unname(sample_max_values),
                                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  write.csv(sample_max_values_df, 
            file.path(output_1, paste0("25samples_max_values_df_", gene, ".csv")), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 找出所有样本最大值中的最小值
  if (all(is.na(sample_max_values_df$max_value))) {
    warning("All max values are NA for gene ", gene)
    min_max_value <- NA_real_
  } else {
    min_max_value <- min(sample_max_values_df$max_value, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  # === 新增：计算V5版本使用的最大值cutoff（80%的最小最大值）===
  if (!is.na(min_max_value)) {
    v5_max_cutoff <- min_max_value * 0.8
  } else {
    v5_max_cutoff <- NA_real_
  }
  
  print(sample_max_values_df)
  print(paste0("The minimum of all sample max values for ", gene, " is: ", min_max_value))
  print(paste0("V5 max cutoff (80% of min_max_value) for ", gene, " is: ", v5_max_cutoff))
  
  # === 版本1：设置最大值cutoff ===
  plots_list_v1 <- list()
  
  for (sample_name in sample_names) {
    sample_obj <- st_25[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      # 创建占位图
      p_placeholder <- ggplot() + 
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (", gene, " not found)")) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15))
      plots_list_v1[[sample_name]] <- p_placeholder
      next
    }
    
    # 绘图（设置max.cutoff = min_max_value）
    if (!is.na(min_max_value)) {
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2,
                              max.cutoff = min_max_value) +
        scale_fill_gradient(
          low = "lightgrey",
          high = "red",
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(sample_name) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
    } else {
      # 如果min_max_value为NA，使用默认设置
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_gradient(
          low = "lightgrey",
          high = "red",
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (no cutoff)")) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
    }
    
    plots_list_v1[[sample_name]] <- p
  }
  
  # 拼接所有样本的图（版本1，按5列排列）
  combined_plot_v1 <- wrap_plots(plots_list_v1, ncol = 5)
  # 保存版本1
  plot_filename_v1 <- file.path(output_1, paste0(gene, "_25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v1.pdf"))
  ggsave(plot_filename_v1, combined_plot_v1, width = 15, height = 20)
  
  # === 版本2：不设置最大值cutoff ===
  plots_list_v2 <- list()
  
  for (sample_name in sample_names) {
    sample_obj <- st_25[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      # 创建占位图
      p_placeholder <- ggplot() + 
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (", gene, " not found)")) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15))
      plots_list_v2[[sample_name]] <- p_placeholder
      next
    }
    
    # 绘图（不设置max.cutoff）
    p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                            pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                            stroke = 0,
                            image.alpha = 0.2) +
      scale_fill_gradient(
        low = "lightgrey",
        high = "red",
        name = gene
      ) +
      ggtitle(sample_name) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
    
    plots_list_v2[[sample_name]] <- p
  }
  
  # 拼接所有样本的图（版本2）
  combined_plot_v2 <- wrap_plots(plots_list_v2, ncol = 5)
  
  # 保存版本2
  plot_filename_v2 <- file.path(output_2, paste0(gene, "_25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v2.pdf"))
  ggsave(plot_filename_v2, combined_plot_v2, width = 15, height = 20)
  
  # === 版本3：三色渐变，红色渐变出现在30%最大值到最大值之间 ===
  plots_list_v3 <- list()
  
  for (sample_name in sample_names) {
    sample_obj <- st_25[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      # 创建占位图
      p_placeholder <- ggplot() + 
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (", gene, " not found)")) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15))
      plots_list_v3[[sample_name]] <- p_placeholder
      next
    }
    
    # 获取当前样本的基因表达数据
    current_sample_data <- as.numeric(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data[gene, ])
    
    # 计算当前样本的最大值和30%最大值作为中间转换点
    sample_max <- max(current_sample_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    sample_30_percent_max <- sample_max * 0.3
    
    # 绘图（使用30%最大值作为中间转换点）
    if (!is.na(sample_max) && sample_max > 0 && sample_30_percent_max > 0) {
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(
          low = "white",
          mid = "lightgrey", 
          high = "red",
          midpoint = sample_30_percent_max,
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(sample_name) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
      
      # 打印每个样本的最大值和30%最大值用于调试
      message(paste0("V3 - Sample: ", sample_name, ", Max: ", round(sample_max, 4), 
                     ", 30% Max: ", round(sample_30_percent_max, 4)))
      
    } else {
      # 如果最大值为NA或0，使用默认渐变
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_gradient(
          low = "lightgrey",
          high = "red",
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (default gradient)")) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
    }
    
    plots_list_v3[[sample_name]] <- p
  }
  
  # 拼接所有样本的图（版本3）
  combined_plot_v3 <- wrap_plots(plots_list_v3, ncol = 5)
  
  # 保存版本3
  plot_filename_v3 <- file.path(output_3, paste0(gene, "_25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v3.pdf"))
  ggsave(plot_filename_v3, combined_plot_v3, width = 15, height = 20)
  
  # === 版本4：三色渐变，红色渐变出现在50%最大值到最大值之间 ===
  plots_list_v4 <- list()
  
  for (sample_name in sample_names) {
    sample_obj <- st_25[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      # 创建占位图
      p_placeholder <- ggplot() + 
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (", gene, " not found)")) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15))
      plots_list_v4[[sample_name]] <- p_placeholder
      next
    }
    
    # 获取当前样本的基因表达数据
    current_sample_data <- as.numeric(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data[gene, ])
    
    # 计算当前样本的最大值和50%最大值作为中间转换点
    sample_max <- max(current_sample_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    sample_50_percent_max <- sample_max * 0.5
    
    # 绘图（使用50%最大值作为中间转换点）
    if (!is.na(sample_max) && sample_max > 0 && sample_50_percent_max > 0) {
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(
          low = "white",
          mid = "lightgrey", 
          high = "red",
          midpoint = sample_50_percent_max,
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(sample_name) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
      
      # 打印每个样本的最大值和50%最大值用于调试
      message(paste0("V4 - Sample: ", sample_name, ", Max: ", round(sample_max, 4), 
                     ", 50% Max: ", round(sample_50_percent_max, 4)))
      
    } else {
      # 如果最大值为NA或0，使用默认渐变
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_gradient(
          low = "lightgrey",
          high = "red",
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (default gradient)")) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
    }
    
    plots_list_v4[[sample_name]] <- p
  }
  
  # 拼接所有样本的图（版本4）
  combined_plot_v4 <- wrap_plots(plots_list_v4, ncol = 5)
  
  # 保存版本4
  plot_filename_v4 <- file.path(output_4, paste0(gene, "_25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v4.pdf"))
  ggsave(plot_filename_v4, combined_plot_v4, width = 15, height = 20)
  
  # === 版本5：结合V1的全局最大值设置和V3的三色渐变方式 ===
  # 最大值设为所有样本最大值中最小值的80%，颜色渐变过渡位置在相应样本最大值的30%值
  plots_list_v5 <- list()
  
  for (sample_name in sample_names) {
    sample_obj <- st_25[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      # 创建占位图
      p_placeholder <- ggplot() + 
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (", gene, " not found)")) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 15))
      plots_list_v5[[sample_name]] <- p_placeholder
      next
    }
    
    # 获取当前样本的基因表达数据
    current_sample_data <- as.numeric(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data[gene, ])
    
    # 计算当前样本的最大值和30%最大值作为中间转换点
    sample_max <- max(current_sample_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    sample_30_percent_max <- sample_max * 0.3
    
    # 绘图（设置全局最大值cutoff为80%的最小最大值，使用30%当前样本最大值作为中间转换点）
    if (!is.na(v5_max_cutoff) && !is.na(sample_max) && sample_max > 0 && sample_30_percent_max > 0) {
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2,
                              max.cutoff = v5_max_cutoff) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(
          low = "white",
          mid = "lightgrey", 
          high = "red",
          midpoint = sample_30_percent_max,
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(sample_name) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
      
      # 打印每个样本的相关数值用于调试
      message(paste0("V5 - Sample: ", sample_name, 
                     ", Sample Max: ", round(sample_max, 4), 
                     ", 30% Sample Max (midpoint): ", round(sample_30_percent_max, 4),
                     ", Global Max Cutoff: ", round(v5_max_cutoff, 4)))
      
    } else {
      # 如果无法设置合适的参数，使用默认渐变
      if (!is.na(v5_max_cutoff)) {
        p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                                pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                                stroke = 0,
                                image.alpha = 0.2,
                                max.cutoff = v5_max_cutoff) +
          scale_fill_gradient(
            low = "lightgrey",
            high = "red",
            name = gene
          ) +
          ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (default gradient with cutoff)")) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
      } else {
        p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                                pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                                stroke = 0,
                                image.alpha = 0.2) +
          scale_fill_gradient(
            low = "lightgrey",
            high = "red",
            name = gene
          ) +
          ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (default gradient no cutoff)")) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 15))
      }
    }
    
    plots_list_v5[[sample_name]] <- p
  }
  
  # 拼接所有样本的图（版本5）
  combined_plot_v5 <- wrap_plots(plots_list_v5, ncol = 5)
  
  # 保存版本5
  plot_filename_v5 <- file.path(output_5, paste0(gene, "_25samples_spatialfeatureplot_v5.pdf"))
  ggsave(plot_filename_v5, combined_plot_v5, width = 15, height = 20)
  
  message("Completed gene: ", gene)
}

message("All genes processed successfully!")

```

3 将ANTXR1这个基因表达值的25%分位数值设为阈值，大于此值的定义为ANTXR1基因表达阳性的细胞。绘制不同分组中阳性细胞的比例图。
```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

group_col <- c('IPF'='#EE7B1B','Ctrl'='#4CA64A')

# 创建输出目录
output_3 <- 'IPF_human/positive_plot'
dir.create(output_3, recursive = TRUE)

# 定义要分析的基因
genes <- c("ANTXR1", "FN1", "COL1A1", "ACTA2")

# 获取元数据
meta <- st@meta.data

# 为每个基因计算阳性细胞并添加到元数据中
for (gene in genes) {
  # 获取基因表达值
  gene_expr <- as.numeric(st[["SCT"]]@data[gene, ])
  
  # 计算25%分位数作为阈值
  gene_quartile <- quantile(gene_expr, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  
  # 定义阳性细胞
  positive_cells <- gene_expr > gene_quartile
  
  # 添加到元数据中
  add_colname <- paste0(gene, '_positive')
  meta[, add_colname] <- ifelse(positive_cells, paste0(gene, '(+)'), paste0(gene, '(-)'))
}

# 将更新后的元数据添加回Seurat对象（可选）
st@meta.data <- meta

# ========== 任务3：按Group分组绘制阳性比例图 ==========

# 计算每个样本在不同Group中的阳性比例
sample_proportions_group <- meta %>%
  group_by(sample, Group) %>%
  summarise(
    total_cells = n(),
    across(
      ends_with('_positive'), 
      list(
        positive_cells = ~ sum(. == paste0(sub("_positive", "", cur_column()), "(+)")),
        positive_ratio = ~ sum(. == paste0(sub("_positive", "", cur_column()), "(+)")) / total_cells
      ),
      .names = "{sub('_positive', '', .col)}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print("Group-based proportions:")
print(sample_proportions_group)

# 为每个基因绘制Group分组的小提琴图
for (gene in genes) {
  gene_col <- paste0(gene, "_positive_ratio")
  
  p_group <- ggplot(sample_proportions_group, aes(x = Group, y = !!sym(gene_col), fill = Group)) +
    geom_violin(trim = TRUE, adjust = 0.5) +
    geom_jitter(colour = "black", fill = "white", size = 2, width = 0.05, alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(title = paste("Proportion of", gene, "Positive Cells by Group"),
         x = "Group",
         y = paste("Proportion of", gene, "Positive Cells")) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 16, hjust = 0.5),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 14)
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = group_col)  # 假设你已定义了group_col颜色
  
  # 保存图表
  ggsave(file.path(output_3, paste0('Group_', gene, '_Positive_FeatureStatPlot.pdf')), 
         p_group, width = 5, height = 5)
  
  message("Saved Group plot for gene: ", gene)
}

# ========== 任务4：按Biopsies分组绘制阳性比例图 ==========

# 计算每个样本在不同Biopsies中的阳性比例
sample_proportions_biopsies <- meta %>%
  group_by(sample, Biopsies) %>%
  summarise(
    total_cells = n(),
    across(
      ends_with('_positive'), 
      list(
        positive_cells = ~ sum(. == paste0(sub("_positive", "", cur_column()), "(+)")),
        positive_ratio = ~ sum(. == paste0(sub("_positive", "", cur_column()), "(+)")) / total_cells
      ),
      .names = "{sub('_positive', '', .col)}_{.fn}"
    ),
    .groups = 'drop'
  )

print("Biopsies-based proportions:")
print(sample_proportions_biopsies)

# 为每个基因绘制Biopsies分组的小提琴图
for (gene in genes) {
  gene_col <- paste0(gene, "_positive_ratio")
  
  p_biopsies <- ggplot(sample_proportions_biopsies, aes(x = Biopsies, y = !!sym(gene_col), fill = Biopsies)) +
    geom_violin(trim = TRUE, adjust = 0.5) +
    geom_jitter(colour = "black", fill = "white", size = 2, width = 0.05, alpha = 0.7) +
    labs(title = paste("Proportion of", gene, "Positive Cells by Biopsies"),
         x = "Biopsies",
         y = paste("Proportion of", gene, "Positive Cells")) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14),
      axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 12),
      legend.title = element_text(size = 12)
    ) +
    scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1")
  
  # 保存图表
  ggsave(file.path(output_3, paste0('Biopsies_', gene, '_Positive_FeatureStatPlot.pdf')), 
         p_biopsies, width = 5, height = 5)
  
  message("Saved Biopsies plot for gene: ", gene)
}

message("All positive ratio plots completed!")

# 可选：保存阳性比例数据为CSV文件
write.csv(sample_proportions_group, 
          file.path(output_3, "Group_positive_proportions_all_genes.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

write.csv(sample_proportions_biopsies, 
          file.path(output_3, "Biopsies_positive_proportions_all_genes.csv"), 
          row.names = FALSE)

message("Positive proportion data saved to CSV files.")

```


4 去除B2样本，另外三个分期的样本各选一张片子（去除重复取样的片子），生成新的st对象
```{r}
dput(names(st_25))
# 定义所需样本名称的顺序
sample_order <- c("HC_1_B0_2", "HC_2_B0", "HC_3_B0_1", "HC_4_B0", 
                  "IPF_1_B1_2", "IPF_2_B1_1", "IPF_3_B1", "IPF_4_B1_2",
                  "IPF_1_B3_2", "IPF_2_B3_2", "IPF_3_B3", "IPF_4_B3")

# 从st_25列表中提取指定的样本
st_12 <- st_25[sample_order]
qs::qsave(st_12,'IPF_human/IPF_list_12samples_SCT_S-BSST1410.qs')

# 验证结果
print(names(st_12))  # 检查是否按指定顺序排列
length(st_12)  # 检查样本数量
```

```{r}
# 创建输出目录
output_4 <- 'IPF_human/12samples_spatialfeatureplot_v1'
dir.create(output_4, recursive = TRUE)

# 定义目标基因
genes <- c("ANTXR1", "FN1", "COL1A1", "ACTA2")

# 循环处理每个基因
for (gene in genes) {
  message("Processing gene: ", gene)
  
  # 1) 计算每个样本中该基因的最大表达量
  sample_names <- names(st_12)
  sample_max_values <- sapply(sample_names, function(sample_name) {
    sample_obj <- st_12[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      warning(sprintf("Gene %s not found in sample %s", gene, sample_name))
      return(NA_real_)
    }
    
    # 提取该样本中该基因的表达量
    gene_expr <- as.numeric(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data[gene, ])
    max_expr <- max(gene_expr, na.rm = TRUE)
    return(max_expr)
  }, USE.NAMES = TRUE)
  
  # 转换为数据框并保存
  sample_max_values_df <- data.frame(sample = names(sample_max_values), 
                                     max_value = unname(sample_max_values),
                                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
  write.csv(sample_max_values_df, 
            file.path(output_4, paste0("12samples_max_values_df_", gene, ".csv")), 
            row.names = FALSE)
  
  # 计算所有样本最大值的25%分位数（用于参考）
  if (all(is.na(sample_max_values_df$max_value))) {
    warning("All max values are NA for gene ", gene)
    cutoff_25_percentile <- NA_real_
  } else {
    cutoff_25_percentile <- quantile(sample_max_values_df$max_value, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE)
  }
  
  print(sample_max_values_df)
  print(paste0("The 25th percentile of all sample max values for ", gene, " is: ", cutoff_25_percentile))
  
  # 2) 为每个样本绘制图（使用V3版本的三色渐变）
  plots_list_v1 <- list()
  
  for (sample_name in sample_names) {
    sample_obj <- st_12[[sample_name]]
    
    # 检查基因是否存在
    if (!("SCT" %in% names(sample_obj@assays)) ||
        !(gene %in% rownames(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data))) {
      # 创建占位图
      p_placeholder <- ggplot() + 
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (", gene, " not found)")) +
        theme_void() +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 10))
      plots_list_v1[[sample_name]] <- p_placeholder
      next
    }
    
    # 获取当前样本的基因表达数据
    current_sample_data <- as.numeric(sample_obj[["SCT"]]@data[gene, ])
    
    # 计算当前样本的最大值和30%最大值作为中间转换点
    sample_max <- max(current_sample_data, na.rm = TRUE)
    sample_30_percent_max <- sample_max * 0.3
    
    # 绘图（使用30%最大值作为中间转换点）
    if (!is.na(sample_max) && sample_max > 0 && sample_30_percent_max > 0) {
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_gradient2(
          low = "white",
          mid = "lightgrey", 
          high = "red",
          midpoint = sample_30_percent_max,
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(sample_name) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12))
      
      # 打印每个样本的最大值和30%最大值用于调试
      message(paste0("Sample: ", sample_name, ", Max: ", round(sample_max, 4), 
                     ", 30% Max: ", round(sample_30_percent_max, 4)))
      
    } else {
      # 如果最大值为NA或0，使用默认渐变
      p <- SpatialFeaturePlot(sample_obj, features = gene,
                              pt.size.factor = 1.5,
                              stroke = 0,
                              image.alpha = 0.2) +
        scale_fill_gradient(
          low = "lightgrey",
          high = "red",
          name = gene
        ) +
        ggtitle(paste0(sample_name, " (default gradient)")) +
        theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12))
    }
    
    plots_list_v1[[sample_name]] <- p
  }
  
  # 3) 拼接所有样本的图（按3行4列排列，适合12个样本）
  combined_plot_v1 <- wrap_plots(plots_list_v1, ncol = 4)
  
  # 4) 保存图片
  plot_filename_v1 <- file.path(output_4, paste0(gene, "_12samples_spatialfeatureplot_v3_30percent.pdf"))
  ggsave(plot_filename_v1, combined_plot_v1, width = 16, height = 12)
  
  message("Completed gene: ", gene)
  message("Saved plot to: ", plot_filename_v1)
}

message("All genes processed successfully!")

```
